title: REINDEX causes "UNIQUE constraint failed" error when using TRIGGER
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id UInt64, value String, amount Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
ALTER TABLE t1 ADD COLUMN unique_value String DEFAULT '';
INSERT INTO t1(value, amount) SELECT value, amount FROM t1;
key_bug_features: REINDEX operation with recursive triggers causes UNIQUE constraint failure
